Title: Enacts the "veterinary care of retired law enforcement and fire service canines act"
Summary: Enacts the "veterinary care of retired law enforcement and fire service canines act" which establishes a program to cover the cost of veterinary services for retired law enforcement and fire service canines.
LawCode: Add §844, Exec L; add §99-uu, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law and the state finance law, in relation to enacting the "veterinary care of retired law enforcement and fire service canines act"
